nasb.text: and I saw Him saying to me, ‘Make haste, and get out of Jerusalem quickly, because they will not accept your testimony about Me.’

esv.text: and saw him saying to me, ‘Make haste and get out of Jerusalem quickly, because they will not accept your testimony about me.’

cnv.text: 看見主對我說：‘你要快快離開耶路撒冷，因為你為我作的見證，他們是不會接受的。’

ccb.text: 看见主对我说，‘赶快离开耶路撒冷，因为这里的人不会接受你为我做的见证。’

csbs.text: 看见主对我说：‘快！赶快离开耶路撒冷，因为他们不会接受你为我做的见证。’
